function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, resolved entity via canonical cast record, and used canonical project READMEs.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/badger.md identifies the workshop printer as alias badger; searching projects for that canonical identifier found four project READMEs, each explicitly linking entity.badger. Their exact titles were extracted from each README header and sorted alphabetically.
